title: CorpusManifestRow
description: One row per functional code unit extracted from the 2,226-repo catalog. Written by the Phase 1 extraction pipeline; read-only for the labelling team. See EXTRACTION_GUIDE.md for the full spec.

unit_id.description: sha1(repo_sha + ':' + path + ':' + line_start) — stable across re-runs on the same clone.

repo_sha.description: SHA256 of the resolved archive (plugins: latest-stable.zip; themes: analogous). Used as the stable version pin.

archive_sha256.description: SHA256 of the downloaded archive file byte-for-byte.

resolved_version.description: Version string resolved from the WordPress.org endpoint (e.g. '8.5.1'). Optional but recorded when available.

collection_date.description: ISO-8601 date the entire corpus was pinned (same value for every row in a collection run).

catalog_tier.description: Tier from repos_catalog.csv. 'poor,top' for the 48 dual-tier repos.

parent_theme.description: Parent theme slug for child themes; null otherwise.

path.description: Relative path within the unpacked archive (e.g. 'includes/class-wc-cart.php').

line_start.description: 1-indexed line of the first character of the unit span (docblock or function/add_ keyword).

line_end.description: 1-indexed line of the closing brace of the unit span, inclusive.

unit_type.description: Syntactic category of the unit per EXTRACTION_GUIDE.md §1.

containing_class.description: Fully-qualified class name for class_method / trait_method / interface_method; null for top_level_function and hook_closure.

hook_name.description: Hook tag string for hook_closure units (e.g. 'init', 'wp_enqueue_scripts'); null otherwise.

unit_text.description: Verbatim source text of the unit span including docblock; original whitespace preserved, no trimming inside the span.

context_above.description: Up to 20 physical lines immediately above the unit span.

context_below.description: Up to 20 physical lines immediately below the unit span.

namespace_block.description: The file's namespace declaration and all top-level use statements, verbatim.

plugin_theme_header.description: Parsed WordPress plugin/theme header fields from the repo root file.

status.description: 'ok' = unit available for labelling tier assignment. 'unavailable' = repo fetch failed (record error). 'filtered' = dropped by a mechanical filter (§3). 'overlap_excluded' = hard-gated by v4 val overlap (§4).

fetch_error.description: HTTP/SVN error message when status=unavailable; null otherwise.

filter_reason.description: Populated when status=filtered; null otherwise. See EXTRACTION_GUIDE.md §3.

dedup_cluster_id.description: SHA1 cluster representative unit_id for exact/near duplicates; null for the kept representative and for non-duplicates.

overlap.description: Populated when unit overlaps a v4 reference row; null if clean. See EXTRACTION_GUIDE.md §4.

set.description: Which v4 reference set the overlap was detected against.

kind.description: 'exact' = normalized-body SHA hash match. 'near' = MinHash Jaccard above threshold.

jaccard.description: Jaccard similarity score for near matches; null for exact matches.

reference_unit_id.description: The matching reference row identifier from the v4 dataset.

v3_corpus_repo.description: True if this repo slug appears in config/repos.yaml (v3 corpus). Same-repo is NOT itself overlap but same-repo+same-file+near-dup body is a strong contamination signal.

phpcs_hints.description: WPCS PHPCS machine findings for this unit. Array of finding objects; null if PHPCS did not run or produced no findings. Shown as collapsible hints to annotators per LABELING_PLAN.md §9.

labelling_tier.description: Assigned sampling tier; null until tier-sampling step runs. Units with status != 'ok' are never assigned a tier.

label_status.description: Lifecycle state of the unit's human label.

batch_id.description: 'batch-{NNN}' identifier linking to labelled/batch-{NNN}.jsonl when label_status=labeled or adjudicated; null otherwise.
